src/main/java/com/examples/Main.java.general_idea: Removed the logging statement from the main method to simplify the entry point.
Added a missing newline at the end of the file to comply with POSIX standards.
src/main/java/com/examples/Main.java.human_impl: File now ends with a newline character.

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/JSON..general_idea: Removed explicit Jackson mapper configuration flags that are now defaults or unnecessary in the newer Jackson version.
Added initialization method for JsonPath library to use the shared Jackson mapper and specific options.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/JSON..human_impl: Added initJsonPathConfig() method setting Configuration.setDefaults with JacksonJsonProvider and JacksonMappingProvider.

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/JSON..general_idea: Replaced manual null checks with Guava Preconditions for cleaner argument validation.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/JSON..human_impl: Replaced if (Objects.isNull(clazz)) throw new IllegalArgumentException(...) with Preconditions.checkArgument(Objects.nonNull(clazz), ...).

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.general_idea: Integrate Spring's PropertyPlaceholderHelper to provide a standard Spring-style placeholder resolution method.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.human_impl: import org.springframework.util.PropertyPlaceholderHelper; private static final PropertyPlaceholderHelper helper = new PropertyPlaceholderHelper("${", "}");

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.general_idea: Integrate the Mustache Java library to support Mustache template rendering within the utility class.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.human_impl: import com.github.mustachejava.DefaultMustacheFactory; private static final MustacheFactory MUSTACHE = new DefaultMustacheFactory();

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.general_idea: Add a public method to resolve placeholders using the Spring PropertyPlaceholderHelper.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.human_impl: public static String resolve(String template, Map<String, String> map) { return helper.replacePlaceholders(template, map::get); }

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.general_idea: Add a public method to render templates using the Mustache engine with a generic data map.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.human_impl: public static <V> String apply(String template, Map<String, V> data) { Mustache mustache = MUSTACHE.compile(new StringReader(template), "template"); return mustache.execute(new StringWriter(), data).toString(); }

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to support the new JDK version.
Inherit from Spring Boot Starter Parent to manage dependency versions and build configuration automatically.
Add Spring Boot Web Starter to enable web application capabilities.
Add Spring Boot JSON Starter for JSON processing support.
Add Spring Boot JDBC Starter for database connectivity.
Add Spring Boot Log4j2 Starter to replace default logging with Log4j2.
Add Lettuce client for Redis connectivity.
Add dotenv-java library for loading environment variables from .env files.
Add OkHttp library for HTTP client functionality.
Add Alibaba Sentinel for circuit breaking and flow control.
Add Resilience4j for fault tolerance patterns.
Add Kryo library for fast object serialization.
Add Netty library for asynchronous event-driven network application framework.
Add Google OR-Tools for optimization and constraint programming.
Add Mustache Java library for template rendering.
Add RocksDB JNI library for embedded key-value storage.
Add LMAX Disruptor for high-performance inter-thread communication.
Add SnakeYAML for YAML parsing and emitting.
Add RoaringBitmap library for efficient bitmap operations.
Add MongoDB BSON library for ObjectId generation and BSON handling.
Add Java UUID Generator for generating UUIDs.
Add Byte Buddy for runtime Java generation and manipulation.
Add Groovy language support.
Add MySQL Connector/J for database connectivity.
Add JMH (Java Microbenchmark Harness) for benchmarking.
Add JMH annotation processor for benchmark generation.
Add Awaitility for fluent waiting in tests.
Add JSON Path library for querying JSON documents.
Add Apache Commons Collections for enhanced collection utilities.
Add Apache Commons IO for file and stream utilities.
Add Spotless Maven plugin for code formatting and import ordering.
Add Aliyun Maven repository mirror for faster dependency resolution in China.
Exclude default Spring Boot logging starter to use Log4j2 instead.
Exclude json-smart from json-path to avoid conflicts or reduce dependencies.
Exclude slf4j-api from java-uuid-generator to avoid version conflicts.

.gitignore.general_idea: Remove unnecessary negation patterns for Maven wrapper and source targets to simplify the ignore rules.
Add .env to gitignore to prevent committing sensitive environment variables.
